description: Template for a weekly recruiting calendar. Fill in dates and company names.

internship_recruiting_season.summer_internships: August–November of the prior year (apply early — many close by October)
internship_recruiting_season.note: Top companies (Google, Meta, Amazon) open applications in August–September. Do not wait for spring.

new_grad_recruiting_season.primary_window: August–December for the following year's new grad cohort
new_grad_recruiting_season.note: New grad timelines shift by company. Check each company's careers page directly.

Tuesday: Log OA results or interview notes
Thursday: Mock interview or timed OA practice
Follow up on pending applications (if 2+ weeks)
